creator: chris@still.whet.org
text:
abacus_sentry is a port scan detector. It's been ported for 
Freebsd-2.2.2 but will most likely work on 2.2.5 . The portball can be found 
at ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/ . The Main distribution site is 
http://www.psionic.com/tools/, installation is straigh foreward, once 
installed edit /usr/local/abacus/abacus_sentry.conf for your machine then run 
abacus_sentry with -tcp or -udp flags to start monitoring for port scans.

Hope this PR submition is better than my last attempt :) .
